---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new documentation surface, architectural explanation, or publication-readiness improvement.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Goal

What should be added or improved?

## Why It Matters

Who benefits, and what problem does this solve?

## Suggested Surface

- README or navigation
- reference documentation
- explanation documentation
- research memo
- article or outreach asset
- community health or governance
- GitHub publication readiness

## Evidence Basis

List the primary sources, official docs, papers, or repository surfaces that support this request.

## Risks Or Boundaries

Does this affect publication safety, legal provenance, biosecurity framing or medical disclaimers?

## Sensitive Data Check

- [ ] No personal genomic data included.
- [ ] No secrets included.
- [ ] The request does not ask for medical advice.
